content.text:
REVISION COMPLETE — plan.md updated for the final interview answers:

- B10 re-pointed to D2 (dev-against-prod; seed becomes a CI-only fixture) — the CRITICAL dissolves because the live schema now matches the committed CSV by construction.
- B7 switched from provisional ceiling to calibrate-from-prod, with the operator-owed fallback retained.
- Q11 folded: validator rejections are the third retryable source; the validator now returns a structured reason.
- questions.md attribution corrected — all answers recorded as user-answered from the real interview.

Zero stale contradictions on the final grep. Handing back for the scoped critic re-verify.
Holding for the team lead's go-ahead on the scoped critic re-verify; no further action taken this turn.
